title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
scenario: Verify that after onboarding and tapping "Continue as Guest", the PPIP dialog appears, and tapping "Don't Share" closes it, shows Home, and the Share data toggle in Account settings is OFF with the correct description.
steps: Observe the PPIP dialog titled 'Help us improve your experience.'
Verify the dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
Navigate to App Settings > General > Account.
Verify the toggle is set to OFF.
Read the description below the toggle.

Confirm the description states that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, no personal information is included, and data is not shared with third parties.
expected: After tapping 'Don't Share', the PPIP dialog closes, the Home screen appears, and in App Settings > General > Account, the Share data toggle is OFF with a description explaining that basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, no personal info is included, and data is not shared with third parties.
